remarks: Experience the best of downtown Stamford living in this beautifully updated top-floor 1-bedroom, 1-bath residence offering 770 sq ft of stylish, comfortable living space and unbeatable convenience.  Featuring high ceilings, elegant crown moldings, and gorgeous dark hardwood floors throughout, this bright and inviting home offers an open, spacious layout designed for comfortable living. Facing south and overlooking downtown, the unit is flooded with natural light all day long.  The modern kitchen is equipped with brand-new appliances, including a gas range and dishwasher, making meal preparation both convenient and enjoyable. The home also offers generous in-unit storage, with additional storage available in the building's dedicated storage room.  Step outside to your oversized private patio-the perfect place to relax or entertain while taking in breathtaking panoramic views of the Stamford skyline from the top floor.  Perfectly situated in the heart of downtown Stamford, you'll enjoy a true walk-everywhere lifestyle, just steps from Target, Stamford Town Center, restaurants, entertainment, public transportation, and several parks. No car is needed.  Residents enjoy excellent building amenities, including two elevators and a convenient on-site laundry room with washers and dryers.  Rent includes: heat, hot water, cold water, gas, sewer, and trash. Tenant is responsible for: electricity, internet, cable, and renters insurance.
